data.content: Tightened BeadsBackend buildTakePrompt to call claimBeat only when the beat is both queued and agent-claimable, preserving simple prompt fallback for non-claimable beats; verified lint, tsc, unit tests (1904 passing), and build with NODE_ENV=production; pushed to origin/main at 9643efe61af7d68a7fa3f0cd07b108f14c250f14.
